title: habenaria pratensis
intro: Habenaria pratensis, also known as the fen orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Habenaria and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation and fever. The health benefits of Habenaria pratensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, bladder problems, and urinary tract infections, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
